one_time_description: FedNor capital funding of $1,000,000 received during the year for community centre construction
economic_notes: Nation receives casino revenues through Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues distributed by formula). Community centre under construction with $5,209,567 capitalized to date. Nuclear Waste Management Ontario provided $200,000 in funding.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024 as template default. Nation is located in Ontario. Long-term debt of $1,809,865 was fully repaid during the year (advances and repayment net to zero at year end). Current liabilities include accounts payable $338,449 and funding repayable $290,453. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership is accounted for as a GBE at nominal value (not equity method consolidated). Expenses_salaries_total calculated by summing salaries and benefits across all segments: Administration $193,958 + Education $260,045 + Health $216,475 + Community & Economic Development $95,409 + Capital Funds $0 + Operations & Maintenance $112,914 = $878,801. Community centre under construction at $5,209,567 not amortized. Nation is 83% dependent on ISC funding. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline noted. COVID-19 significant event disclosed.
